strings.start: Thank you for your time today! We'd love to hear about your experience. This will only take a moment.
strings.positive_rating: Thank you for the great rating!
strings.negative_rating: I'm sorry to hear that. Your feedback is important to us.
strings.submitted: Thank you for your feedback! Your input helps us improve our service.
strings.submit_error: I appreciate your time, though I'm having trouble submitting your feedback right now.
